---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, tooling addition, or standards enhancement
title: '[FEAT] <short description>'
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief one- or two-sentence description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how? Why is the current state insufficient?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — diagrams, pseudocode, or references to similar implementations are all welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you prefer this solution over them?

## Acceptance Criteria

How will we know this feature is complete and working correctly? Define measurable, testable outcomes.

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, external standards, prior art, or community discussions.

---

> **Note:** For standards-related proposals, please also reference the specific section of the standard you'd like to amend.
